recommendations.title: Altitude
recommendations.overview: After a mysterious malfunction sends their small plane climbing out of control, a rookie pilot and her four teenage friends find themselves trapped in a deadly showdown with a supernatural force.

recommendations.title: The Texas Chain Saw Massacre
recommendations.overview: Five friends head out to rural Texas to visit the grave of a grandfather. On the way, they stumble across what appears to be a deserted house, only to discover something sinister within. Something armed with a chainsaw.

recommendations.title: Sniper: Assassin's End
recommendations.overview: Special Ops sniper Brandon Beckett is set up as the primary suspect for the murder of a foreign dignitary on the eve of signing a high-profile trade agreement with the United States. Narrowly escaping death, Beckett realizes that there may be a dark

recommendations.title: Savages
recommendations.overview: A group of Italian tourists on a Caribbean holiday finds itself stranded on a deserted island after a plane crash.

recommendations.title: Go Goa Gone
recommendations.overview: A rave party off the coast of Goa goes horrifyingly and hilariously wrong when the island is overrun with zombies.

recommendations.title: Don't Grow Up
recommendations.overview: Teenage delinquents who are living in an island youth center wake up to find themselves alone with no one to watch over them. After much partying, they realize the island has been deserted and the adults have been infected by a mysterious epidemic.

recommendations.title: Send Help
recommendations.overview: Two colleagues become stranded on a deserted island, the only survivors of a plane crash. On the island, they must overcome past grievances and work together to survive, but ultimately, it's a battle of wills and wits to make it out alive.

recommendations.title: The Red Turtle
recommendations.overview: The dialogue-less film follows the major life stages of a castaway on a deserted tropical island populated by turtles, crabs and birds.

recommendations.title: Inmate Zero
recommendations.overview: There's a zombie outbreak after a medical trial in an international detention and medical facility on an isolated island. An ex US Special Forces/bodyguard woman inmate and a guard form a team.

recommendations.title: My Hero Academia: Two Heroes
recommendations.overview: All Might and Deku accept an invitation to go abroad to a floating and mobile manmade city, called 'I-Island', where they research quirks as well as hero supplemental items at the special 'I-Expo' convention that is currently being held on the island
